fields.name: UrSaloon
fields.short_description: All-in-one solution for appointments, billing, staff management, inventory, and customer loyalty — built for single salons and multi-branch chains.

fields.name: BPO Platform
fields.short_description: Streamline your outsourced operations with automated workflows, real-time tracking, quality monitoring, and SLA dashboards built for BPO teams.

fields.name: HRMS
fields.short_description: End-to-end HR management — employee records, payroll, attendance, leave, performance reviews, and compliance reporting in a single platform.

fields.name: ERP
fields.short_description: Integrate finance, procurement, inventory, manufacturing, and sales into a unified ERP system tailored to your business processes.

fields.name: AI Chatbot
fields.tagline: Intelligent Conversational AI for Your Business
fields.short_description: Deploy a custom AI-powered chatbot trained on your business data — handles customer support, lead qualification, FAQs, and appointment booking 24/7.

fields.name: Recruitment Management System
fields.short_description: Manage the full recruitment lifecycle — job postings, applicant tracking, interview scheduling, offer management, and onboarding in one platform.
